events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His legendary guitar riffs with Queen have inspired generations. What's your favourite Queen track featuring Brian's unmistakable sound?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens with that iconic first video. The Buggles declared 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – but we're still here, aren't we?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks a celebration of Oasis's debut album 'Definitely Maybe', which was officially released on August 29, 1994, becoming a Britpop landmark.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Definitely Maybe, definitely a classic. We're tipping our hats to Oasis's groundbreaking debut album today. What's the track that still gives you shivers?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: Fifty-seven years ago, the legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off in upstate New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Rewind to 1969! Today marks the anniversary of Woodstock, three days of peace, love, and iconic music that defined a generation. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since Elvis Presley left us, but his music and legacy live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today we remember guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, leaving an indelible mark on music.

angles.name: Guitar Genius Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His innovative guitar work changed music forever. What's the Hendrix track that still blows your mind?

events.title: Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks a celebration of The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, which was originally released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Crossing The Road To History
angles.copy: That iconic album cover, those timeless tracks. We're celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' today. Which song from the album is always on your playlist?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' distinctive lead singer, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and style with The Pretenders are truly iconic. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice behind so many anthems. What's your top track from Liam, with Oasis or solo?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks a celebration of John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine', which was released as a single in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since its UK single release, John Lennon's 'Imagine' continues to resonate. A powerful message that's as relevant as ever.

events.title: First iPod anniversary
events.blurb: Today we mark the anniversary of the first Apple iPod, which was unveiled on October 23, 2001, and released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when you could carry '1,000 songs in your pocket'? Today we're looking back at the launch of the very first iPod. How did it change your music listening?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: It's Global James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today, we remember John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday. He was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the life and enduring legacy of John Lennon. A true visionary whose music still inspires.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is undeniable. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?
